decisions.text: Confirm the four seats and everyone installs the Claude desktop app
Agree the privacy protocol — desktop, local, minimise & redact
Shortlist 3–5 Phase 1 operations to improve efficiency
Assign an owner and a target date to each
Set the date for our first review check-in

phases.name: Phase 1
phases.label: Efficiency
phases.description: Cut time cost and raise quality — accuracy and completeness — across all existing delivery work.

phases.name: Phase 2
phases.label: Data Visualisation
phases.description: Dashboards and exception reports so management can see WIP, deadlines and capacity at a glance.

phases.name: Phase 3
phases.label: Client Acquisition
phases.description: Lead generation, conversion and CRM — fill new capacity with higher-value work.

operations.name: Review proforma FS
operations.description: Review proforma financial statements before submission to Partner, using the hk-audit-review skill to identify errors, inconsistencies and omissions
operations.notes: Review proforma financial statements before submission to Partner, using the hk-audit-review skill to identify errors, inconsistencies and omissions

operations.name: Cross-check tax notes, report and balance sheet
operations.description: Cross-reference tax notes, auditor's report and balance sheet for numerical and disclosure consistency across the full set of draft financial statements
operations.notes: Cross-reference tax notes, auditor's report and balance sheet for numerical and disclosure consistency across the full set of draft financial statements

operations.name: Draft audit planning memorandum (Section C)
operations.description: Draft Section C of the audit planning memorandum and compare output to that generated from AP4.1 to identify differences for partner review
operations.notes: Draft Section C of the audit planning memorandum and compare output to that generated from AP4.1 to identify differences for partner review

operations.name: Draft audit completion memo (Section B)
operations.description: Draft Section B of the audit completion memorandum using the audit-completion-memo skill, and compare output to that generated from AP4.1
operations.notes: Draft Section B of the audit completion memorandum using the audit-completion-memo skill, and compare output to that generated from AP4.1
operations.conditions: Requires: proforma FS, profits tax computation, lead schedules uploaded. Trigger with keyword 'Section B'.

operations.name: Draft final completion memorandum (Section A)
operations.description: Draft Section A of the final completion memorandum and compare output to that generated from AP4.1 to identify differences for partner review
operations.notes: Draft Section A of the final completion memorandum and compare output to that generated from AP4.1 to identify differences for partner review

operations.name: AP4.1 — staff input UI and AI spreadsheet population
operations.description: Build an HTML input form for audit staff; Claude Code populates AP4.1 audit programme spreadsheets via openpyxl, replacing manual data entry across multiple sheets
operations.notes: Build an HTML input form for audit staff; Claude Code populates AP4.1 audit programme spreadsheets via openpyxl, replacing manual data entry across multiple sheets

operations.name: Prepare employer's returns (BIR56A / 56B)
operations.description: Draft BIR56A and BIR56B from payroll data; staff verify against HR records before submission to the IRD
operations.notes: Draft BIR56A and BIR56B from payroll data; staff verify against HR records before submission to the IRD
operations.conditions: Requires: payroll data in structured format; personal data minimised.

operations.name: Bank confirmation preparation
operations.description: Prepare bank confirmation requests to the client's bankers, including standard confirmation wording and schedules of accounts for audit purposes
operations.notes: Prepare bank confirmation requests to the client's bankers, including standard confirmation wording and schedules of accounts for audit purposes

operations.name: Documents sent with Audited Financial Statements
operations.description: Prepare documents to accompany the signed AFS, including representation letter and director remuneration disclosure for client signature
operations.notes: Prepare documents to accompany the signed AFS, including representation letter and director remuneration disclosure for client signature

operations.name: Prepare profits tax computation and schedules
operations.description: Prepare profits tax computation with supporting tax schedules, extracting relevant figures from the audited financial statements and lead schedules of the engagement
operations.notes: Prepare profits tax computation with supporting tax schedules, extracting relevant figures from the audited financial statements and lead schedules of the engagement

operations.name: Client letter — tax assessment and demand note
operations.description: Prepare a covering letter to the client upon receipt of the tax assessment and tax demand note, explaining the assessment, payment deadline and any action required
operations.notes: Prepare a covering letter to the client upon receipt of the tax assessment and tax demand note, explaining the assessment, payment deadline and any action required

operations.name: Expediting letter to IRD
operations.description: Identify profits tax returns filed to the IRD where assessment has not yet been issued; draft a letter to the IRD expediting the finalisation of the client's taxation affairs
operations.notes: Identify profits tax returns filed to the IRD where assessment has not yet been issued; draft a letter to the IRD expediting the finalisation of the client's taxation affairs

operations.name: Review client bank statements for audit
operations.description: Review and summarise client bank statements to identify unusual transactions, large cash movements and potential related-party payments for audit planning
operations.notes: Review and summarise client bank statements to identify unusual transactions, large cash movements and potential related-party payments for audit planning

operations.name: Draft audit queries letter
operations.description: Draft audit queries letter to the client based on review of draft financial statements and lead schedules, listing outstanding information requests and clarifications required
operations.notes: Draft audit queries letter to the client based on review of draft financial statements and lead schedules, listing outstanding information requests and clarifications required

operations.name: Prepare depreciation and fixed asset schedule
operations.description: Prepare the depreciation and fixed asset schedule from the fixed asset register and additions/disposals listing, reconciled to the accounts and tax computation
operations.notes: Prepare the depreciation and fixed asset schedule from the fixed asset register and additions/disposals listing, reconciled to the accounts and tax computation

operations.name: Prepare IRD objection letter
operations.description: Prepare a formal objection letter to the IRD against a tax assessment where the basis of assessment appears incorrect, setting out grounds for objection with supporting calculations
operations.notes: Prepare a formal objection letter to the IRD against a tax assessment where the basis of assessment appears incorrect, setting out grounds for objection with supporting calculations

operations.name: Client letter — statement of tax losses
operations.description: Prepare a letter to the client upon receipt of the statement of tax losses from the IRD, explaining the loss position and implications for future tax liabilities
operations.notes: Prepare a letter to the client upon receipt of the statement of tax losses from the IRD, explaining the loss position and implications for future tax liabilities

operations.name: Upload bank confirmation and notify via Odoo
operations.description: Upload the bank confirmation received from the bank into the engagement file; notify the respective Client-in-charge and Auditor-in-charge via Odoo message to confirm receipt and trigger the next audit step
operations.notes: Upload the bank confirmation received from the bank into the engagement file; notify the respective Client-in-charge and Auditor-in-charge via Odoo message to confirm receipt and trigger the next audit step

operations.name: Generate Xero year-end manual journal CSV
operations.description: Use the xero-yearend-journal skill to produce an importable manual journal CSV from TB movements for upload into Xero; UTF-8 BOM, DD/MM/YYYY format
operations.notes: Use the xero-yearend-journal skill to produce an importable manual journal CSV from TB movements for upload into Xero; UTF-8 BOM, DD/MM/YYYY format
operations.conditions: Requires: prior year Xero TB export + current year financials + Xero journal template.

operations.name: Inter-company balance reconciliation
operations.description: Reconcile inter-company balances across group entities and prepare a summary of outstanding differences, with proposed adjusting entries for group reporting
operations.notes: Reconcile inter-company balances across group entities and prepare a summary of outstanding differences, with proposed adjusting entries for group reporting

operations.name: MPF schedules and payroll cross-check
operations.description: Draft MPF contribution schedules and cross-check payroll records against MPF trustee statements; flag any discrepancies for management action
operations.notes: Draft MPF contribution schedules and cross-check payroll records against MPF trustee statements; flag any discrepancies for management action

operations.name: Draft minutes, resolutions and statutory forms
operations.description: Draft board minutes, written resolutions and statutory forms (NNC1, ND2A) including routine resolutions for approval of FS, dividend declaration, change of auditor and change of bank signatories; CDD verification remains manual
operations.notes: Draft board minutes, written resolutions and statutory forms (NNC1, ND2A) including routine resolutions for approval of FS, dividend declaration, change of auditor and change of bank signatories; CDD verification remains manual

operations.name: Prepare new client documents
operations.description: Prepare engagement letter, clearance letter to previous auditor and tax representative appointment letter for a new client engagement
operations.notes: Prepare engagement letter, clearance letter to previous auditor and tax representative appointment letter for a new client engagement

operations.name: NAR1 and AGM preparation schedule
operations.description: Prepare a schedule of key dates for NAR1 annual return filing and AGM preparation, cross-referenced to the company's financial year end and Companies Ordinance deadlines
operations.notes: Prepare a schedule of key dates for NAR1 annual return filing and AGM preparation, cross-referenced to the company's financial year end and Companies Ordinance deadlines

operations.name: Draft NAR1 annual return
operations.description: Draft NAR1 annual return pre-populated from the previous year's filing and updated for any changes in directors, shareholders or registered office address
operations.notes: Draft NAR1 annual return pre-populated from the previous year's filing and updated for any changes in directors, shareholders or registered office address

operations.name: Client compliance calendar
operations.description: Prepare a compliance calendar showing key statutory deadlines — NAR1, PTR, employer's return, AGM — and flag items falling due within 60 days
operations.notes: Prepare a compliance calendar showing key statutory deadlines — NAR1, PTR, employer's return, AGM — and flag items falling due within 60 days

operations.name: Client onboarding pack
operations.description: Draft full client onboarding pack including KYC checklist, CDD questionnaire, engagement letter and fee proposal, tailored to the client's industry and corporate structure
operations.notes: Draft full client onboarding pack including KYC checklist, CDD questionnaire, engagement letter and fee proposal, tailored to the client's industry and corporate structure

operations.name: Draft bilingual client communications
operations.description: Draft formal English emails and written Cantonese WhatsApp messages for client communications; staff review tone and accuracy before sending
operations.notes: Draft formal English emails and written Cantonese WhatsApp messages for client communications; staff review tone and accuracy before sending
